name: Seafood Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 pound crab claw meat, leave claw
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the roux: In a heavy skillet or pot, mix 1/2 cup flour and 1/2 cup oil while cold. Turn heat to medium low and stir until the flour coats the bottom evenly. Cook, stirring constantly, until the roux very slowly browns (about 15 minutes). It will lighten when liquid is added; a good time to remove from heat is when the flour separates from the grease.
2. Add only boiling water to the roux to prevent lumps. Alternatively, add the roux to a pot of gumbo that is already freezing.
3. Prepare vegetables and seafood one at a time before cooking. The roux may be prepared ahead of time.
4. In a large pot, sauté onion, bell pepper, okra, and celery in olive oil until soft.
5. Add water, tomatoes, bouillon cubes, spices, and half the shrimp to the vegetables. Bring to a boil and cook about 30 minutes.
6. Add crab claws and any remaining crab bodies still in shell (like a soup bone). Simmer for an additional hour before adding the rest of the seafood.
7. Serve over rice.
